name: ai-software-auditor
description: AI Software Auditor Platform — monorepo root

scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:worker: cd workers && python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:worker
